Header files for GPIO, UART, JavaScript execution, and configuration on ESP8266 microcontroller.


## Files
- **[esp8266_gpio.h](esp8266_gpio.h.md)**: Defines GPIO pin configurations, modes, and functions for the ESP8266 microcontroller.
- **[esp8266_uart.h](esp8266_uart.h.md)**: Defines UART port and baud rate enumerations for ESP8266.
- **[jerry_extapi.h](jerry_extapi.h.md)**: Header file for defining exit codes and a function to register JavaScript functions in JerryScript.
- **[jerry_run.h](jerry_run.h.md)**: Header file for JavaScript execution functions on ESP8266, including entry, eval, loop, and exit.
- **[native_esp8266.h](native_esp8266.h.md)**: Functions for GPIO direction, setting, and getting on ESP8266 in a C/C++ compatible interface.
- **[user_config.h](user_config.h.md)**: Defines the stack size configuration for JerryScript on ESP8266.
